_comment: Universal function-calling schema for mythosforge-brandkit. Hand the matching block to any tool-use LLM. Parameters identical across shapes; only the envelope differs. openai = OpenAI / Bankr LLM Gateway / Surplus / Codex / Cursor. anthropic = Claude Messages API tool-use.

from.description: Extract mode: path or URL to a reference image to distill a style token from.

author.description: Author mode: validate/fill a hand-written token (no key needed).

in.description: Author mode: optional path to a partial token JSON to fill from.

function.name: mythosforge_brandkit
function.description: Extract (from a reference image, via Gemini vision) or author a reusable brand/style token (brandkit.json) — palette, typography, feel words, prompt_suffix — that every generator + lookgate share for one consistent visual identity. Writes the token to disk and returns its path. Extract mode requires the caller's own GEMINI_API_KEY (or BRANDKIT_API_KEY); author mode needs no key.

from.description: Extract mode: path or URL to a reference image.

author.description: Author mode: validate/fill a hand-written token (no key).

in.description: Author mode: optional partial token JSON to fill from.

anthropic.name: mythosforge_brandkit
anthropic.description: Extract (from a reference image, via Gemini vision) or author a reusable brand/style token (brandkit.json) — palette, typography, feel words, prompt_suffix — that every generator + lookgate share for one consistent visual identity. Writes the token to disk and returns its path. Extract mode requires the caller's own GEMINI_API_KEY (or BRANDKIT_API_KEY); author mode needs no key.

from.description: Extract mode: path or URL to a reference image.

author.description: Author mode: validate/fill a hand-written token (no key).

in.description: Author mode: optional partial token JSON to fill from.

invocation.note: When the model emits a tool call with the args above, the host harness maps them to this shell command and runs it (extract mode: GEMINI_API_KEY or BRANDKIT_API_KEY must be set; author mode needs no key):
invocation.returns: The style token JSON (and { ok, mode, name, path, token } wrapper). Feed the token / path back to the model as the tool result.
